calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maria Yuen for Audrey Miles (Successor Trustee). Steve Schroeder for Inheritance Funding Company (Objector). Dennis Vann for Deborah DeJean (Former Personal Representative). Larry Miles (appeared late) in propria persona.

Mr. Schroeder provided argument to support his position stating that there has been no effort to sell the property, no accountings done, or any attempt to pay the debts of the estate, and that a final accounting is not appropriate. Mr. Vann stated that three beneficiaries appeared and didn't want to sell the property, that there is no opposition to the first and final accounting, that his client could not qualify for a loan, and noted that the only thing that could be done was to distribute the property; the debts would have to be rectified in Civil court. Ms. Yuen stated that she was in agreement with Mr. Vann. Mr. Schroeder presented additional argument stating that the former administrator has been living in the property for three years rent free because she has avoided service, that there should be a surcharge, that she has never accounted, that she has not fulfilled her fiduciary duties, and that he is not sure if the house is insured. The Court stated that it understood his position but that it was the Court's job to make sure the assets are distributed, that the estate is closed, and that it was leaning towards granting the petition. The matter was taken under submission. Mr. Vann noted for the record that he and Ms. Yuen had reached an independent agreement regarding the statutory fees. The Court stated that the attorney fee request would be granted as written and the agreement would be between he and Ms. Yuen. Larry Miles appeared late, the matter was recalled, and Mr. Miles stated he had paid some of his mother's taxes and expressed his concerns. The submission stands.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Jackie Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Brian Rice.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status
Off Calendar Oct-22-2008 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status
Off Calendar Oct-08-2008 Continued To Oct-22-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maria Yuen for Audrey Miles (Successor Executor).

The Court noted that the final distribution should have been completed. Ms. Yuen stated that it was ready, that her client needed to review it, and that she had been having some difficulty in reaching her client. The matter was continued to October 22, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status
Off Calendar Sep-10-2008 Continued To Oct-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for and with Deborah DeJean. Maria Yuen for and with Audrey Miles.

Dennis Vann stated that the property taxes had not been paid, that neither beneficiary wanted to sell the property and suggested that the parties file a petition for distribution. The Court stated that the estate should be closed, that the Bright Street property was the only asset and directed Mr. Vann to file the petition for final distribution. The matter was continued to October 8, 2008 for status on the filing of the petition for final distribution.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status
Off Calendar Aug-13-2008 Continued To Sep-10-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maria Yuen for and with Audrey Miles. Dennis Van for and with Deborah DeJean. Larry Miles in propria persona.

Deborah DeJean stated that she and her siblings would like to retain their mother's property and expressed an interest in making payments to their brother Larry Miles. She further stated that she was prepared to pay the overdue property taxes today. The Court directed the parties to meet and confer outside the presence of the Court to try and work out the matter.

All present at second call of the matter except Larry Miles. Mr. Van stated that in the midst of discussions Larry Miles left the parties. In addition, Mr. Van stated that the buy out would take place, the property taxes would be paid today, and they would provide proof of the payment of the property taxes to Larry Miles. At counsel's request the Court continued the matter to September 10, 2008. The Court admonished Deborah DeJean and Audrey Miles for violating the Court's order and stated they were technically in contempt today. Ms. DeJean was further admonished that a failure to appear at the next hearing would result in the Court imposing sanctions.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Jackie Alameda/Sajja Ravinantapricha. Probate Examiner: C. Nahnsen. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status
Off Calendar Jul-23-2008 Continued To Aug-13-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maria Yuen for Audrey Miles (Executor).

Ms. Yuen stated that her client wanted to call off the eviction and that she had not heard from Ms. DeJean since the 15th. The Court informed Ms. Yuen that he wanted her client to appear and explain why she called off the eviction. The matter was continued to August 13, 2008. Ms. Miles and Ms. DeJean are to appear at the next hearing.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Wong.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status
Off Calendar Jun-24-2008 Continued To Jul-23-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maria Yuen for Audrey Miles (Executor). Dennis Vann for the Former Administrator.

Mr. Vann had nothing to report. Ms. Yuen stated that she had a writ of execution issued and that the eviction was scheduled for July 16, 2008. In addition, she stated that the insurance policy was ready to go and that she was just waiting to receive the check for payment to the insurance company. The matter was continued to July 23, 2008 for further status.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status
Off Calendar May-28-2008 Continued To Jun-24-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status
Off Calendar Apr-29-2008 Continued To May-28-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maria Yuen for Audrey Miles (Executor).

The Court questioned why Mr. Vann and Mr. Schroeder were not present. Ms. Yuen stated that there was an issue with the insurance, that her client had limited income and was trying to purchase short term insurance. In addition, she stated that someone was occupying the premises, but that the processs server was unable to serve the order to vacate. The Court suggested having the sheriff's office do service. The court allowed posting and mailing of the order to vacate, (signing the order for the same in open court). The matter was continued to May 28, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Rafael Cabrera.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status
Off Calendar Feb-20-2008 Continued To Apr-01-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janathan Newman for Audrey Miles (successor executor), Dennis Vann for Deborah DeJean, Steven Schroeder for Inheritance Funding Co. (interested party), and Larry Miles beneficiary.
Mr. Vann stated that he has nothing further to report. Mr. Miles stated that Ms. DeJean is living in the home, Mr. Newman suggested of issuing a writ of execution, court grants the request and Mr. Newman to prepared the writ.
The matter was continued to April 1, 2008 for further status, if everything is accomplished, written status is sufficient and no appearance is necessary.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Bailiff: Deputy Handa.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE Final Accounting By The Former Executor
Off Calendar Jan-23-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Ms. DeJean (Former Executor).

Mr. Vann reported that he was not getting cooperation from his client. In addition, he stated that the property was free and clear, that there was no mortgage, and that Ms. DeJean has a 40% interest in the property. The Court ordered that no Citation would be issued and that all surcharges would be deducted from her share of the Bright street property. The matter was set for hearing on February 20, 2008 for status. Mr Vann is to inform Mr. Newman of the next hearing date. Mr. Vann will prepare the order.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Obi.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE Final Accounting By The Former Executor
Off Calendar Dec-12-2007 Reset To Jan-23-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES- ATTY. DENNIS VANN FOR DEBORAH MILES DEJEAN (FORMER EXECUTOR)

ATTY DENNIS VAN REPORTED TO THE COURT REGARDING THE ONLY REMAINING ADMINISTRATION COST IS THE ATTORNEY'S FEE. THE COURT HAS APPOINTED AUDREY MILES AS THE NEW PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE OF THE ESTATE DURING THE LAST HEARING IN THIS CASE. THE COURT WANTS AN ACCOUNTING FROM THE FORMER PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE (MS. DEJEAN) AND FOR HER TO APPEAR IN THE NEXT HEARING. ATTY VANN HAS ALSO REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT HIS CLIENT IS NOT COOPERATING AND HE INTENDS TO WITHDRAW FROM THE CASE. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO JANUARY 23, 2008.

JUDGE: JOHN DEARMAN, REPORTER: KATY BERSAMIN, CSR 1172 ; CLERK CYNTHIA HERBERT BAILIFF: FELICIA SMITH

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filling Of Final Account
Off Calendar Oct-31-2007 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-12-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Newman for Larry Miles. Audrey Miles also present. Dennis Vann for Deborah DeJean (Prior Executor).

Mr. Newman reported that Ms. Miles was prepared to be appointed as Successor Executor, that she was in need of Counsel and that she needed more time to file her petition. Mr Vann informed the Court that Ms. DeJean had not filed the accounting. The Court issued an Order To Show Cause to Deborah DeJean for failure to file a Final Account. The return date on the OSC is December 12, 2007. The Court set the matter for status on filing the Petition for Appointment of Successor Executor of Audrey Miles to November 14, 2007. No appearance is necessary if the petition is filed before that date.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Doug Handa.

Petition For Removal Of Admin. & Revocation Of Letters Of Admin.
Off Calendar Oct-05-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Jonathan Newman appearing for petition Larry Miles. Dennis Vann appearing for the personal representative. Mr. Vann was informed by the broker that the personal representative would not cooperate with the sale. Court is granting the petition to remove him. Final accounting is due in 30 days. Status for filing of the final account is set on 10/31. Mr. Newman requested for appointment of a special administator. Court asked him to see if there was an alternate named in the Will. If no alternate was named, Mr. Newman will file a ex parte petition for appointment of special administrator. Mr. Newman will prepare an order.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.

Petition For Removal Of Admin. & Revocation Of Letters Of Admin.
Off Calendar May-22-2007 Continued To Aug-21-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Dennis Vann appearing for executor. Steven Schroeder appearing for Inheritance Funding Co.. The property has been listed for sale with Makras Property. Mr. Newman informed Mr. Vann that he is not appearing this morning. Matter is continued to 8/21.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR# 7782. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.

Petition For Removal Of Admin. & Revocation Of Letters Of Admin.
Off Calendar Apr-11-2007 Continued To May-22-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Dennis Vann appearing for personal representative. Jonathan Newman appearing for peitioner Larry Miles. Counsel have met and confer and they have reached an agreement on how to proceed. By 5/21, the personal representative will either have opened up escrow for the 60% interest of the property or have proof that she has listed the property for sale. Mr. Vann requested to have $336,000.00 remained in a blocked account with the escrow company. They will petition for distribution from that account. Matter is continued to 5/22. Mr. Vann will prepare the order.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Guitron.

Petition For Removal Of Admin. & Revocation Of Letters Of Admin.
Off Calendar Mar-13-2007 Continued To Apr-11-07 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Larry Curtice (specially appearing for Jonathan Newman, Counsel for Larry Miles, Petitioner); Dennis Vann (Counsel for Deborah Dejean, Personal Representative ); Steven Schroeder (Counsel for Inheritance Funding Company, Inc., Requestor); Deborah Dejean (Personal Repersentative); Larry Miles (Petitioner); Audrey Miles (Beneficiary).

At the outset, the Court denied the application for waiver of Court fess and costs of Larry Miles and allowed Mr. Miles until April 1, 2007 to pay the fees due and owing. Mr. Vann asked for clarification of the amount his client (Ms. Dejean) will be required to obtain in order to purchase the outstanding interests of the other beneficiaries (Mr. Schroeder noting that his client maintains an interest in the determination of the fair market value of the property). After further discussion, the Court set the matter for evidentiary hearing on the Petition for removal of Administrator for April 11, 2007 at 11:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: None; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.
